# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- When implementing refactors, update nearby comments/docstrings to keep architecture and code intent accurate.
- For this repository's architecture folders, prefer file prefixes `App_`, `Gfx_`, `Vk_`, `Gpu_`, and `Pf_` for App, Gfx, RenderCore, RenderContract, and Platform respectively when renaming files for folder-origin clarity.
